untranslatable_reason: Head-and-shoulders bottom pattern requires visual pattern recognition (identifying points G, H, K, F, J and neckline geometry) which cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. The signal also requires dynamic stop management based on new lows and volatility-based tightening, which requires pattern-specific logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Pattern detection (H&S bottom, neckline identification, geometric relationships) is not expressible with available indicators. Attempted to approximate using price crossing SMA as a proxy for neckline breakout direction. Stop loss set to 17% per source text. Average decline of 18% captured in parameters. The complex stop management logic (lower stop on new lows, volatility-based tightening) requires custom pattern engine implementation.
